title: athyrium tenuipaleatum
intro: Athyrium tenuipaleatum, also known as the Himalayan lady fern, is a species of fern that is native to the Himalayan region. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and treating digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Athyrium tenuipaleatum is often prepared in herbal tea or tincture form for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
